name: 80/20 Analysis (Pareto Principle)
what_it_is: Roughly 80% of effects come from 20% of causes - find where value is concentrated.
core_mechanic: List all inputs/activities. Quantify contribution to output. Rank. Identify top 20% driving 80% of results. Decide to double down on the 20% or address the long tail for strategic reasons. Be intentional either way.
when_to_use: Spread too thin and need to find focus / Resource constraints force a choice / Effort and output feel misaligned
when_not_to_use: All inputs contribute roughly equally / The long tail matters for strategic reasons (trust, compliance, etc.)
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps activities to estimated outputs, identifies the top 20% hypothesis, proposes what to stop doing to free capacity for highest-leverage activities.
